content: Cold start for Spring Boot on Cloud Run: 5-15s typical. Mitigations: (1) min-instances=1 (eliminates scale-from-zero cold starts, billed idle); (2) startup CPU boost (up to 50% faster); (3) layered JAR/Jib to avoid fat-JAR unpacking; (4) spring.main.lazy-initialization=true for non-critical beans. GraalVM native gets to <500ms but adds build complexity.
